description: Single-event reference hook for SubagentStop. Fires when a sub-agent's turn ends; appends a timestamped marker plus the full hook JSON payload (read from stdin) to /tmp/hook-fired-subagentstop.log.

hooks.command: p="$(cat)"; { echo "$(date -u +%FT%TZ) subagentStop fired"; echo "$p"; echo; } >> /tmp/hook-fired-subagentstop.log
